pi_items.source: task.json description explicitly requires the agent to add the exact tag 'DeepTech'
task.json description requires filtering dives strictly greater than 20 meters
setup_task.sh configures the initial file here, and the task description explicitly names this path for saving

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real dive data (SampleDivesV2.ssrf) downloaded directly from the official Subsurface GitHub repository. The target file path (/home/ga/Documents/dives.ssrf), the depth threshold (20.0 meters), and the exact expected tag ('DeepTech') are directly verified by checking the explicit instructions in task.json and the environment setup script.
